Combatting this brutal winter with as many homemade pizza nights as possible 🍕 🥶 ❤️ 🇮🇹 

These tomatoes 🍅 from @prisinzanoproducts are truly remarkable. Grown at their villa on the Amalfi coast ☀️ 🏖️ they are some of the sweetest we’ve ever tasted! 

For the dough this was our first time trying to replicate the ultra thin and crispy pizza Tonda Romana from Rome 🇮🇹 Did we nail it? Listen to that crunch!

name: eggslut
bio: 257K Followers, 0 Following, 596 Posts - See Instagram photos and videos from Eggslut (@eggslut)

topPosts.alt:
☕️ CINNAMON TOAST COLD BREW ☕️

Our slow-steeped cold brew sweetened with cinnamon, chicory & brown sugar simple syrup mixed with toasted cereal oat milk 😋

Now available at all Los Angeles locations
- @beverlycenter 
- @americanabrand 
- @grandcentralmarketla 
- Venice Beach
Photo by Eggslut on April 05, 2025.
Photo shared by Eggslut on March 27, 2026 tagging @eggslutuk, and @gourmetnortheast. May be an image of hotdog, chicken sandwich, buns and text.

Atlanta, it’s about to get EGG-STRA 🍳 @eggslut VIRAL Breakfast Sandwiches are officially open at Atlanta’s newest hotel @moxydowntownatl 🍳🥐 Breakfast will never be the same! 

Whether you prefer breakfast in the morning or afternoon, there’s never a bad time for Eggslut 🍳🔥
The fried chicken sandwich? 10/10.
The truffle tater tots? I’m still thinking about them 😮‍🔥

Safe to say… I’ll definitely be back! Stop in & let me know what you think!

#breakfast #eggslut #atlanta #atlfoodie #foodporn

First time or every time? 🍳
📍 @grandcentralmarketla 
🎥 @kamtoeat_foodie / @kammyhou

@eggslut just opened its very FIRST location on the east coast right in the heart of downtown atl and you know i had to check it out😋 from the vibes to the sandwiches, i can confirm that the hype is real🔥

we tried their bacon, egg & cheese, the fairfax, and the truffle hashbrowns. the bacon, egg & cheese was really good and they def didn’t skimp out on the bacon, but next time i’d try it with the fluffy scrambled eggs instead of the fried egg. the fairfax was also really good but i think it would’ve been even better if i added bacon and avocado for a better texture. but GIRLLL, the real star of the show was def the truffle hashbrowns. the truffle aroma hits you instantly and it’s literally cooked to perfection. the cold ketchup on the side was def the perfect finishing touch🤌🏼

and you didn’t hear it from me but rumor has it that they’re opening a second location in the Krog District in the spring 👀

📍eggslut (located inside the Moxy Atlanta Downtown)
329 Marietta St NW, Atlanta, GA 30313

Sun-Thurs: 6:30am-1pm & 5pm-10pm
Fri-Sat: 6:30am-1pm & 5pm-1am
-
-
-
#eggslut #atlfoodie #atlanta #atlantafood #foodie

Brioche French Toast 🤜🤛 Maple Custard
🎥 @byfoodiegal
Photo shared by Eggslut on March 04, 2026 tagging @moxydowntownatl. May be an image of boiled egg and text that says 'Opening soon! EGGSLUT MOXY DOWNTOWN ATLANTA OPENING 5,2026 eggslut slut eggs'.

New month, new week, new opening in Atlanta! Be the first to visit @moxydowntownatl x @eggslut, officially opening Thursday, March 5! 🔥

I got a VIP first look and this downtown spot is bold, playful, and pure ATL energy. 👀 

Eggslut is officially here, making its first East Coast debut in ATL and it is crave worthy. Be sure to devour the Atlanta exclusive menu items, the Bricky w/ brisket and the Dirty Bird w/ fried chicken, you cannot get them anywhere else. And definitely add the truffle hashbrowns to your order, they are a must.

Sip cocktails at Bar Moxy, grab a bite or snacks at the bar — drink favorites we tried include Rebellious VSOP and Moxy Sings Blues, every drink next level delicious.

They also have the @jaggersuite rooftop lounge with skyline views and late night vibes, I will share more once I visit.

Be the first to visit whether you are planning a staycation, girls night, or a quick catch up. This is the hotspot!

📍 @moxydowntownatl | 329 Marietta St NW, Atlanta
🅿️ Dining guests receive discounted garage parking ($10 for the first 3 hours)

#atlanta #moxyhotel #eggslut #eggsontheregs #jaggersuite

The yolk hits different 🍳 Toronto, get ready
@eggslutcanada

Atlanta, ready? 🍳
🗓️ March 5
📍 @moxydowntownatl

Photo by BEAUTY BOOST MED SPA ® | Aesthetic Procedures on March 27, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'LIP RESET BEFORE Bp @beautyboostmedspa after'.

Why does it feel like everyone is talking about peptides right now 👀✨🧪

A peptide stack simply refers to combining different peptides together, often selected based on specific goals and how they may complement one another. You’ve probably seen them come up more in wellness conversations; especially around recovery, body composition, and overall performance support 😍✨

Some are explored in routines focused on:
✨ Supporting recovery
✨ Maintaining a leaner look
✨ Keeping up with a more active lifestyle

But not all peptides; or combinations; are the same. Differences in selection, dosing, and individual response can all influence how they’re used, which is why a more personalized approach is key 👏🏼

Understanding how these combinations work, what sets them apart, and how they’re typically incorporated into wellness routines is what really makes the difference✨

Still have questions? Drop them down below ⬇️✨

#peptidetherapy #peptides #glowup✨ #wellness 
#metabolichealth 

peptidetherapy wellness peptidetherapy glowup ocmedspa glowup healthandwellness peptides

Not all “regenerative” treatments are the same; and understanding the difference between PDGF, PDRN, PRF, and PRP is key to choosing the right approach 👀

Here’s a breakdown:
✨ PDGF (Platelet-Derived Growth Factor): A signaling protein involved in cell communication and tissue processes
✨ PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide): DNA fragments that are commonly used in skin-focused treatments
✨ PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma): Derived from your own blood, containing a concentration of platelets and growth factors
✨ PRF (Platelet-Rich Fibrin): Also from your own blood, but processed differently to create a fibrin matrix that allows for slower release of growth factors

The key differences come down to how they’re derived, how long they remain active, and how they’re used in treatment planning. 

We love talking about all things regenerative ✨ Still have questions? Ask us below ⬇️

#regenerativeaesthetics #prfezgel #pdgf #pdrn #prp 

collagenstimulators pdgf pdrn prfezgel ocmedspa aesthetictreatments ocmedspa orangecounty medspa beautyboost

Regenerative aesthetics is evolving; and treatments like PDGF are changing the way we approach skin and hair rejuvenation 👀

PDGF (platelet-derived growth factors) works by signaling your body to repair, regenerate, and build healthier tissue at a cellular level. Instead of just adding volume, it’s actively improving skin quality and supporting long-term results from within.

What makes it especially exciting? We’re seeing near-instant visible changes in delicate, high-demand areas:
✨ Under eyes: brighter, smoother, less crepey
✨ Smile lines: softened while still looking natural
✨ Hair: improved scalp health and early signs of regrowth

PDGF is all about working with your body; stimulating collagen, improving circulation, and enhancing overall tissue health.
Every regenerative option has its place, and the key is choosing the right approach for your goals. PDGF is proving to be a powerful tool for patients who want both immediate glow and deeper, long-term benefits 💉✨

Have questions or want to know if you’re a candidate? Drop them below ✨💉

#pdgf #regenerativeaesthetics #undereyebags #undereyetreatment ocmedspa

regenerativeaesthetics undereyefiller pdgf collagenstimulators undereyetreatments

Every aesthetic journey begins with a first step. For some, it’s skincare. For others, a subtle treatment that enhances what’s already there 💉🩷

We asked our team one simple question: what was your first treatment, and how old were you?

Now we're asking you, what was your first aesthetic treatment & how old were you? 👀✨

#beautyboostmedspa #aesthetictreatments #botoxfacial #medspa #nurseinjector

If your skin and energy feel off… this might be why 👀

Our Glow Boost combines several key peptides to support skin quality and overall tissue health. Many patients incorporate this into their routine as a way to focus on looking refreshed and maintaining healthy skin over time 🩷✨

Paired with our Brain & Energy Boost, which plays a key role in how cells produce energy and support normal cellular processes, this combination is a popular option for those wanting something quick, low-commitment, and easy to add into their schedule ✨

The NAD shot is commonly used in wellness routines centered around:
✨ Cellular energy (ATP production)
✨ Supporting mitochondrial function
✨ Cellular repair processes
✨ Focus and overall mental clarity

As always, treatments are personalized based on your goals, and a consultation is the best way to determine what’s right for you 👏🏼

If you’re wanting to look and feel your best inside and out call us at (949)514-8602 or book online

#peptidetherapy #hairgrowth #peptides #nad #skincareroutine 

peptidetherapy peptides nad ocmedspa orangecounty glowingskin glassskin hairgrowth

Wait… you can get a BBL without surgery? 👀🍑

Radiesse is a biostimulatory injectable made of calcium hydroxylapatite, which means it does two things:
🩷Provides immediate structure and contour
🩷Stimulates your body’s natural collagen production over time

So instead of just filling, we’re also working on:
✨ Improving skin thickness + firmness
✨ Enhancing overall texture
✨ Creating more supported, lifted contours

Results happen in phases;you’ll see initial shape right away, with continued improvement as collagen builds in the months after treatment 😮‍💨🤌🏼

This approach is best for patients who want subtle, natural-looking enhancement and better skin quality; without the downtime or commitment of surgery 💉

Let us know would you get a non-surgical bbl??? 🤭👀

#radiesse #bbl #nonsurgicalbbl #brazilianbuttlift #biostimulator 

nonsurgicalbbl brazilianbuttlift biostimulator radiesse bbl orangecounty ocmedspa

I’m kinda busy… but not too busy to see you before April 17th 🤰✨

Before our founder and aesthetic injector, Anisa, steps away for maternity leave and prepares to welcome her baby, this is your official heads up. Her schedule is already filling quickly, leading up to April 17th 📆✨

If you have been planning to see Anisa for treatment, a consultation, or a touch-up, now is the time to secure your appointment before she begins her leave 💉

Anisa is expected to return on August 3rd. If you would like to see her when she returns, our team can place you on the priority waitlist and schedule your appointment once her schedule reopens 🩷

We are so excited for Anisa as she enters this new chapter and cannot wait to welcome the newest member of the Beauty Boost family🩷💉

Call (949)514-8602 or click the link in our bio to reserve your appointment before April 17th 📲🩷

#maternityleave #ocmedspa #aesthetictreatments #medspalife #pregnancy 

maternityleave pregnancy medspa orangecounty ocmedspa

Most people think PDO threads are just a lift… but the real benefit is collagen 😌

PDO (polydioxanone) threads are biocompatible, dissolvable sutures that are placed beneath the skin using a small cannula or needle. Once placed, they create mechanical support for the tissue while also triggering the body’s natural healing response.
As the threads gradually dissolve over several months, they stimulate new collagen production, which can help improve:
✨Skin firmness
✨Tissue support
✨Sagging in the lower face or neck
✨Overall skin quality

Common treatment areas include the jawline, cheeks, midface, and neck, particularly for patients experiencing early to moderate skin laxity who want a non-surgical option 💉✨👏🏼

To get the non-surgical facelift of your dreams call us at (949)514-8602 or book online 📲

#facelift #ocmedspa #nonsurgicalfacelift #pdothreads #pdothreadsfacelift 

collagenstimulators facelift ocfacelift nonsurgicalfacelift

one thing I have to remind myself constantly is that treating melasma is not about quick-fixes. it takes time, commitment to consistency and patience. patience in the process. it’s so important to keep my expectations realistic. now that being said, I am beyond pleased in my results so far. I don’t think yall are ready to see my skin after this one 🤭

Spring upgrades to support pigmentation control + pore clarity as we prepare for summer ✨

- Exfoliating Polish to reduce buildup + congestion
- EvenTone Intensive to target + prevent pigment at the source
- Protect daily with Smart Tone SPF 

Smoother texture. More even tone. Less Congestion.

Photo by Kim, RN | Best You Med Spa in Best You MedSpa with @beautyinjectorsara, @bestyoumedspa, @thelipinjector, @_nursenikki_, @bestyoubella, @bestyoumaya, @bestyouashley, @bestyoujacky, @bestyoukristen, and @bestyouemily. May be an image of one or more people, makeup and text.
wouldn’t change this for anything 🤍 there’s something so special about getting to do what you love every single day — grateful doesn’t even cover it 🧖‍♀️

You asked and it’s officially here!!! PRF EZ Gel all natural injectables!!! 🪸✨

What is it? We take your blood, spin it and isolate all your body’s own amazing growth factors — then inject them into areas of concern!

What does it treat?
✨ Texture
✨ Volume loss
✨ Dark circles

How many treatments?
We recommend a series of 3 to start!

When will I see results? 😍
Results start showing within the first couple of weeks and keep getting better over the following months as your body builds collagen — most patients see their best results after completing their series of 3! 🙌

📲 DM us, tap the link in bio, or call to book your first session 🤍​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

We can’t wait to meet and treat you!!

name: staygold31
bio: 455K Followers, 639 Following, 599 Posts - See Instagram photos and videos from SOFIE STAYGOLD (@staygold31)

topPosts.alt:
This didn’t start with a product. It started behind the chair as a barber.

Years of cutting hair, learning people, and understanding what actually works in barbering.

Barbering gave me something I didn’t have before…focus, purpose, and a creative outlet that kept evolving with me.

Being part of building STMNT Grooming wasn’t about creating something new, it was about refining what barbers actually need in real situations.

The longer you stay committed to your craft, the more doors start to open.

Still learning. Still evolving.

What’s something your craft has given you that nothing else has?

With everything going on right now…

It’s easy to forget how much impact this barbering industry really has on people and communities.

Appreciate hearing this conversation with @myfabolouslife 💈❤️

Name a better duo than this 😍

Barbering Babyliss Pro Dual Coil 
Photography Hasselblad X2D II 

There’s something about creativity, it lets you refine, capture, and really feel what matters to you.

When you invest in yourself, you almost force yourself to make it work.

I’ve been building that since my first camera, the Canon Rebel T3i like back around 2012-2013. So to finally have my dream photography camera in my hands now… it’s crazy. I can’t even stop looking at it.

It’s a reminder of what consistency, learning, and putting in the reps actually leads to. ❤️

Forgetting my mic mid-project used to mean scrapping everything. Not anymore.

@adobeexpress Enhance Speech turned that setback into my most reliable workflow hack.

No panic. No compromise. The best tool is the one that’s always with you.

Watch till the end—the before and after says everything. 

#adobeexpresspartner #audiohack #creatortools #contentcreatortips

All my favorite things 🥹

Did you know you could do this? 

Where do you edit most of your mobile content on?

Photo shared by SOFIE | CONTENT PRODUCTION on March 05, 2026 tagging @staygold31. May be an image of poster, beret and text that says '@STAYGOLD.LA I've been a barber since 2011. ' been creating content since 2012. It took me until 2022 to realize they were building the same thing. The in- -between is supposed to feel this hard. 国商要内が物系た . 新港电好'.
🇰🇭❤️ In my whole life, maybe 3 people have ever guessed correctly. 😆

Photo by SOFIE STAYGOLD on February 24, 2026. May be a black-and-white image of poster and text that says 'THE PRICE YOU CHARGE IS A REFLECTION OF WHAT YOU BELIEVE YOU'RE WORTH.. and wh at you've shown the world you anduwhatyouestsnttyura careabout. about. care @staygold31'.

Feather razors are personal.

It’s the final touch. The detail work. The part of the haircut that shows your artistry. 

That’s why we created custom STMNT STAYGOLD MALACHITE feather razors for our US ambassador team. 

Not just a tool, but something that represents their journey and the level they’re building toward.

If you’re part of a team and want to create custom engraved razors with your logo, send me a DM.

If you want to grab the Staygold razor for yourself, comment “RAZOR” and I’ll send you the link. 😊🫶🏼

Thank you @bowserduong for the capture 🎥
Photo by SOFIE STAYGOLD on February 14, 2026. May be an image of beret, croissant, cornflower and text.
Photo shared by SOFIE STAYGOLD on February 10, 2026 tagging @juliuscaesar, and @staygold.la. May be an image of one or more people, bangs, top, camera and text.
